title: Settings
business_purpose: Provide a noob-proof control panel for supported settings, safe read-only admin views, placeholders, and Advanced Diagnostics.
primary_user_context: An admin or operator reviewing AKTI ERP settings in local/demo mode.
user_goal: Understand what settings are available, what is coming later, and how to set up diagnostics without seeing raw technical details by default.
success_outcome: Settings sections are clear, safe, and do not expose unsupported controls or fake data.

visibility_rules.description: Visible to users with settings/admin capability coverage.

record_scope_behavior.description: Settings must remain organization-scoped and must not expose cross-tenant data or raw IDs to normal users.

data_sources.label: Portal mode
data_sources.description: Reads organization portal mode for the General section.

data_sources.label: Modules
data_sources.description: Reads available modules for read-only display.

data_sources.label: Advanced Diagnostics
data_sources.description: Contains admin-gated bearer token/session diagnostics only.

api_routes.description: Update organization portal mode with safe Gatekeeper denial UX.
Read available modules for settings display.

required_entities.purpose: Render organization portal mode where session context is safe.

empty_data_behavior.title: No settings available yet
empty_data_behavior.message: Some settings are coming in a future phase.

empty_state.title: Settings are ready to review
empty_state.message: Choose a section to see available settings and future-phase placeholders.

permission_denied_state.title: Permission needed
permission_denied_state.message: You don’t have permission to make this change. Contact your administrator.

degraded_mode_state.title: Limited diagnostics mode
degraded_mode_state.message: Some settings are unavailable until your session is active.

forbidden_behaviors: Do not claim implementation from this planned contract.
Use this exact 403 message: You don’t have permission to make this change. Contact your administrator.
Use this exact approval_required message: This action requires approval. Contact your administrator.
Use this exact API unreachable message: Settings are temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
Do not invent other Gatekeeper denial messages, approval UI, raw error codes, stack traces, or technical API messages for normal users.
Users & Roles is BUILT for list/read where existing API and session context safely support it; invite/create/update flows are PLACEHOLDER unless already safely supported.
Groups / Access is BUILT for list/read where existing API and session context safely support it; mutations are gated and may remain PLACEHOLDER.
Hierarchy / Organization Structure is BUILT read-only or minimal safe view where existing APIs support it.
Modules is BUILT read-only using module registry/list API; no installer, enable/disable, Foundry, or module lifecycle operations.
Security is PLACEHOLDER for Phase 5A/auth/security policy.
Notifications is PLACEHOLDER for Phase 5A notification/communication policy.
Advanced Diagnostics is BUILT, admin-gated, and the only place where bearer token/session technical details may appear.
Do not implement login, OAuth, production auth replacement, Foundry, module installer, platform AI runtime, production launch, or real WhatsApp production behavior.
